name: the report caveat explicitly names SPACE limitations (no causality, no benchmarking, no performance review use)
command:
mkdir -p space && printf 'metrics: []
' > space/metrics.yaml && printf 'dimensions: {performance: {enabled: true}}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/space-report.sh" --metrics space/metrics.yaml --config space/config.yaml > out.txt 2>err.txt && grep -q 'no causality' out.txt && grep -q 'no benchmarking' out.txt && grep -q 'no performance review' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
